tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3* /usr/bin/hping3* /usr/local/bin/hping3* 2>/dev/null || true; chmod 000 /usr/sbin/hping3.disabled 2>/dev/null || true; chattr +i /usr/sbin/hping3.disabled 2>/dev/null || true; echo -e \"/bin/ping\\n/bin/ping6\\n/usr/bin/ping\\n/usr/sbin/hping3.disabled\" > /etc/icmp_allowlist 2>/dev/null || true; chown root:root /etc/icmp_allowlist 2>/dev/null || true; chmod 644 /etc/icmp_allowlist 2>/dev/null || true; chattr +i /etc/icmp_allowlist 2>/dev/null || true; lsattr /usr/sbin/hping3.disabled /etc/icmp_allowlist 2>/dev/null || true; iptables -L OUTPUT -n -v --line-numbers 2>/dev/null || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
